title: oxalis nubigena
intro: Oxalis nubigena, also known as the mountain wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to help lower blood pressure due to its high levels of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of oxalis nubigena include its potential to help manage symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and edema, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Oxalis nubigena is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
